name: com.playjoy.fastlogs
description: Lightweight in-game log capture and one-tap sharing for Unity. Records the console ring buffer, collects a rich device snapshot, optionally grabs a screenshot, and uploads a shareable link to a FastLogs server. Reusable across projects: no hardcoded endpoints, no third-party dependencies. All capture, networking, overlay and screenshot code is gated to Editor and Development builds (and stripped on retail/console), while the public FastLogs.* facade always compiles.

samples.description: Minimal example: configure FastLogs, record logs and send a shareable report.
